title: Will the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup be a country that has never won before?
question_text: Will the winner of the 2026 FIFA World Cup be a country that has never won before?
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as **Yes** if the winner of [2026 FIFA World Cup](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup) is a country other than Uruguay, Italy, Germany, Brazil, England, Argentina, France, or Spain.
edge_cases: Resolves VOID if the source market voids or is marked N/A.
